Title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Capacity planning and scaling
Description: Learn about capacity planning and scaling practices that can help you sustainably achieve the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products.

Title: Design multi-agent memory architectures with Azure Cosmos DB
Description: Design multi-agent memory architectures for production AI systems using Azure Cosmos DB. Implement semantic memory with vector storage, configure context window optimization strategies, design memory expiration and pruning policies, and build context-aware agent behaviors based on recalled history.

Title: Connect Microsoft services to Microsoft Sentinel
Description: Connect Microsoft services to Microsoft Sentinel

Title: Implement Windows security enhancements with Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
Description: Implement Windows security enhancements with Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

Title: Run pipelines in Azure Machine Learning
Description: Learn how to create and use components to build pipeline in Azure Machine Learning. Run and schedule Azure Machine Learning pipelines to automate machine learning workflows.

Title: Understand app management using Microsoft Intune
Description: In this module, you learn about app management using Microsoft Intune.

Title: Design a solution to log and monitor Azure resources
Description: Design a solution to log and monitor Azure resources

Title: Publish an ASP.NET Core app
Description: Learn how to publish an ASP.NET Core app for deployment to a web server or cloud service.

Title: Interactive case study: Securing endpoints and infrastructure
Description: Apply your cybersecurity architect skills on a real business scenario in the area of endpoint and infrastructure security. Analyze design requirements, answer conceptual and technical questions and design a solution to meet the business needs.

Title: Microsoft Education technology and AI learning concepts
Description: Explore foundational concepts for Microsoft education technology and AI-powered learning. Learn how institutions modernize securely, support teaching and learning, and align technology decisions with institutional goals.

Title: Explain threat hunting concepts in Microsoft Sentinel
Description: Explain threat hunting concepts in Microsoft Sentinel

Title: Introduction to the Microsoft commercial marketplace
Description: Learn about the Microsoft commercial marketplace, including Microsoft AppSource, Azure Marketplace, offer types, and Marketplace Rewards.

Title: Connect threat indicators to Microsoft Sentinel
Description: Connect threat indicators to Microsoft Sentinel

Title: Protect identities in Microsoft Entra ID
Description: This module introduces students to the various authentication methods used to protect identities.

Title: Implement Windows Server Storage Replica
Description: Implement Windows Server Storage Replica

Title: Transition from traditional ops to agentic DevOps workflows
Description: Learn how to evolve traditional cloud administration and DevOps tasks into agentic AI workflows using agent instructions, skills, and multi-agent orchestration.

Title: Innovate using RISE with SAP on the Microsoft Cloud
Description: Explore how to leverage both RISE with SAP and Microsoft Cloud to optimize workflows, automate tasks, enhance decision-making, and improve team communication and collaboration.

Title: Evaluating generative AI applications
Description: Learn the fundamental concepts of evaluating generative AI applications.

Title: Handle events with Azure Functions and Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL change feed
Description: Use Azure Functions bindings to integrate a function with Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL.

Title: Develop code features using GitHub Copilot tools
Description: This module explores using GitHub Copilot autocompletion suggestions to create new code. Autocompletion suggestions are generated, managed, and implemented using the GitHub Copilot extension for Visual Studio Code.

Title: Why Windows 11 Pro, why now
Description: In this module, you'll understand the reasons to upgrade to Windows 11 Pro and the different upgrade scenarios that help drive upgrades.

Title: Collect guest operating system monitoring data from Azure and hybrid virtual machines using Azure Monitor Agent
Description: Discover how to set up and integrate a Log Analytics agent with a workspace in Defender for Cloud using the Azure portal, enhancing security data analysis capabilities.

Title: Explore API Management
Description: Learn how the API Management service functions, how to transform and secure APIs, and how to create a backend API.

Title: Guided project - Deploy and manage a container app using Azure Container Apps
Description: Learn to configure Azure Container Registry, Azure Container Apps, and the other resources required for an app deployment scenario. Learn to configure a container apps solution for continuous integration, scaling, and revision management.

Title: Create and architect with functions in F#
Description: Learn what functions are and how to define and call them. In addition, use function patterns to architect with functions.

Title: Prepare for a program approval event
Description: Organize and support the approval process for your program. Define the main processes in program approval and respond to feedback from an approval panel.

Title: Introduction to Copilot in Microsoft Fabric
Description: Introduction to Copilot in Microsoft Fabric.

Title: Discover Microsoft guidelines for responsible conversational AI development
Description: Learn Microsoft guidelines for the development of responsible conversational AI, such as chat bots and voice-controlled systems.

Title: Store and apply operations on list data in F#
Description: This module covers collections in F#, with a specific focus on lists.

Title: Implement multi-stage reasoning in Azure Databricks
Description: Implement multi-stage reasoning in Azure Databricks

Title: Configure and manage Azure Database for PostgreSQL
Description: Azure Database for PostgreSQL efficiently manages vast quantities of data and their structures through system catalogs and views. This module explores how to optimize database performance by accessing and configuring metadata, understanding the role of the vacuum process in maintaining database health, and managing server settings. We introduce practical techniques to enhance your PostgreSQL database administration, useful in environments requiring robust data handling and security features.

Title: Explore relational database services in Azure
Description: This content is a part of Explore relational database services in Azure.

Title: Accessibility best practices for games and platforms
Description: Learn about foundational accessibility best practice principles that you can use to guide the development of games and platforms. Also learn how to use the Xbox Accessibility Guidelines, a free online resource for developers that provides a comprehensive list of best practices organized by specific game elements and features.

Title: Build accessible SharePoint sites
Description: Learn the best practices, benefits, and principles of creating accessible content for those using your SharePoint sites.

Title: Implement IP Address Management
Description: Implement IP Address Management

Title: Protect data in-transit and at rest
Description: Protect data in-transit and at rest

Title: Create Real-Time Dashboards with Microsoft Fabric
Description: Real-Time Dashboard is a capability in Microsoft Fabric that you can use to create interactive data visualizations.

Title: Prepare to migrate VMware resources to Azure by deploying Azure VMware Solution
Description: Prepare to migrate VMware resources to Azure by deploying an Azure VMware Solution resource. Then, connect your VMware environment to Azure VMware Solution.

Title: Use Eventstream in Microsoft Fabric
Description: Eventstream in Real-Time Intelligence (RTI) enables you to ingest, transform, and route real-time data.

Title: Build multi-table statements using KQL
Description: Build multi-table statements using KQL

Title: Create multi-page .NET MAUI apps with tab and flyout navigation
Description: Use .NET Multi-platform App UI (MAUI) shell to create multi-page applications with tabs and flyout navigation.

Title: Understand client-server communication in PostgreSQL
Description: PostgreSQL is a client-server system, which allows many clients to connect to a central server. In this module you learn how PostgreSQL manages connections from clients, and looking at some common PostgreSQL client tools.

Title: Secure Unity Catalog objects
Description: Learn how to implement comprehensive security for Unity Catalog objects in Azure Databricks, including access control, fine-grained permissions, credential management, and authentication strategies.

Title: Create a new .NET project and work with dependencies
Description: Create a .NET project and learn to add packages and manage package dependencies in your project. Use the .NET Core CLI and NuGet registry to add libraries and tools to your C# applications through Visual Studio Code.

Title: Improve SAP seller productivity with Microsoft Teams and Power Platform
Description: Integrate applications from SAP with the Microsoft 365 applications. Enable productivity and collaboration in "SAP Sales and Service Core" Teams app to support sales by building Power Automate flows.

Title: Plan to deploy updates for Windows clients and Microsoft 365 apps
Description: In this module, you’ll learn how to plan updates for the clients and applications across your organization.

Title: Explore Azure Automation with DevOps
Description: Learn how to implement Azure Automation with DevOps using runbooks, webhooks, and PowerShell workflows. Understand automation accounts, shared resources, source control integration, and hybrid management for automated cloud operations.

Title: Explore quantum superposition with Q#
Description: Learn about the concept of superposition in quantum computing, how to represent superposition states for a single qubit with the Bloch sphere, and how to create and analyze superposition states with Q#.

Title: Implement canary releases and dark launching
Description: Learn canary release strategies, Azure Traffic Manager configuration, and dark launching techniques for progressive delivery and risk-controlled deployments.

Title: Secure access for Microsoft Entra Agent Identity
Description: Secure AI agent identities by applying Conditional Access policies through Microsoft Entra Agent Identity. Map authentication flows, configure CA policies scoped to agents, and control agent access and lifecycle events to reduce identity-based risk.

Title: Secure enterprise and browser-based AI apps with Microsoft Purview
Description: Secure enterprise and browser-based AI apps with Microsoft Purview

Title: Explore Azure Event Grid
Description: Explore Azure Event Grid

Title: Translate text and speech with Microsoft Foundry Tools
Description: Translate text and speech using Azure Translator and Azure Speech in Foundry Tools

Title: Get started with SQL Database in Microsoft Fabric
Description: Learn how SQL Database in Microsoft Fabric works, the key concepts, and practical examples to help users SQL Database effectively as part of their analytics solutions.

Title: Create and manage Active Directory objects
Description: This module focuses on the tasks associated with managing Active Directory objects and AD domain services domain controllers.

Title: Manage GitHub Actions in the enterprise
Description: Learn how to manage GitHub Actions in the enterprise.

Title: Work with data in Microsoft Sentinel using Kusto Query Language
Description: Work with data in Microsoft Sentinel using Kusto Query Language

Title: Automate database deployment
Description: Automate database deployment

Title: Introduction to GitHub Copilot
Description: GitHub Copilot is an AI-powered coding assistant that helps you write, understand, refactor, and maintain code directly from your editor and chat interface.

Title: Apply storage concepts to Windows containers running on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) and AKS Hybrid
Description: Learn storage concepts that help you solve real problems with Windows containers running on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) and AKS Hybrid.

Title: Run a training script as a command job in Azure Machine Learning
Description: Run a command job with the Azure Machine Learning Python SDK v2.

Title: Guided project - Embrace responsible AI
Description: Go beyond theory and learn how to implement Responsible AI framework into a learning environment. Learn through real-world examples and interactive exercises. This module is designed to help integrate AI systems into various work environments.

Title: Use an Azure Machine Learning job for automation
Description: MLOps, automation, Machine learning operations

Title: Prepare to deploy updates for Windows client and Microsoft 365 apps
Description: In this module, you'll review recommended tasks and deliverables needed to prepare your organization for a Windows 11 upgrade.

Title: Enhance meeting productivity with Copilot in Microsoft Teams
Description: Discover how Copilot in Microsoft Teams transforms meetings into searchable, interactive summaries that help teams stay informed and aligned.

Title: Implement disaster recovery for SAP workloads in Azure
Description: This module explores disaster recovery support of Azure for SAP workloads, including deployments within single and multiple Azure regions, multi-tier SAP NetWeaver app deployment in Azure, and Azure services, such as Active Directory and DNS. Prepare for Exam AZ-120 Planning and Administering Microsoft Azure for SAP Workloads.

Title: Design overall AI strategy for business solutions
Description: Learn to design an enterprise AI strategy using Azure's Cloud Adoption Framework. Align AI agent lifecycle with business goals for operational excellence.

Title: Adopt FinOps on Azure
Description: Learn how to implement FinOps on Azure.

Title: Organize a Fabric lakehouse using medallion architecture design
Description: Explore the potential of the medallion architecture design in Microsoft Fabric. Organize and transform your data across Bronze, Silver, and Gold layers of a lakehouse for optimized analytics.

Title: Understand the business impact of Copilot+ PCs
Description: Learn how Copilot+ PCs support modern organizations through on-device AI, cloud-connected services, and Windows 11 Pro capabilities. Explore how AI-powered workflows, security, governance, and productivity features help businesses improve flexibility, collaboration, and operational efficiency.

Title: Approach your data-flow diagram with the right threat model focus
Description: Threat modeling is an effective technique to help you identify threats and ways to reduce or eliminate risk. We start by deciding to focus on either what needs to be protected or who it needs protection from.

Title: Describe Microsoft Azure resources management
Description: Perform basic resource management tasks for Azure resources, including compute, storage, and networking.

Title: Explore Infrastructure as Code and configuration management
Description: Learn Infrastructure as Code (IaC) foundational concepts, environment deployment strategies, configuration management approaches, and idempotent configuration principles for automated infrastructure operations.

Title: Introduction to Azure Cloud Shell
Description: In this module, you learn what Azure Cloud Shell does, how it works, and when you should choose to use Azure Cloud Shell as a solution to meet your organization’s needs.

Title: Use Slurm for HPC on Azure CycleCloud
Description: Learn how to use the Slurm job scheduler with Azure CycleCloud.

Title: Describe the data compliance solutions of Microsoft Purview
Description: Describe the data compliance solutions of Microsoft Purview.

Title: Optimize query performance for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
Description: Learn how to optimize query performance and reduce costs for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL workloads by configuring indexes and selecting consistency levels.

Title: Monitor workload protection in Azure Backup
Description: Learn how to monitor Azure Backup-protected workloads by using Azure Monitor.

Title: Discover common terms and meanings for SAP on Azure
Description: You're introduced to some of the common terms that will be used in working with SAP workloads on Azure. Prepare for Exam AZ-120 Planning and Administering Microsoft Azure for SAP Workloads.

Title: Evaluate costs and benefits of AI solutions
Description: Learn to assess costs and benefits of AI solutions. Develop ROI analyses, evaluate TCO, and decide to build, buy, or extend AI components.

Title: Solution architect series: Explore Microsoft Copilot Studio
Description: Learn how Microsoft Copilot Studio is used in solutions.

Title: Get started with AI Builder category classification
Description: Discover how to utilize AI Builder category classification to tag text with category labels, like emails.

Title: Set up pipeline environments in Microsoft Power Platform
Description: Learn how to set up pipeline environments in Microsoft Power Platform.

Title: Build intelligent agents in Microsoft Copilot Studio
Description: Learn how to build intelligent agents by adding knowledge sources to provide contextual, relevant responses in Microsoft Copilot Studio.

Title: Create your first desktop flow - Online workshop
Description: Follow the steps to create your first desktop flow.

Title: Discover and use Web APIs with Power Apps
Description: Build a custom connector using an OpenAPI document or Azure API Management to send data to and receive data from web APIs.

Title: Delegate agent tasks using child agents in Copilot Studio
Description: Learn to structure complex Copilot Studio agents using child agents. Create focused subagents, configure how they receive tasks and return results, and control when they're invoked to build organized, scalable agent solutions.

Title: Azure confidential computing
Description: Learn about Azure confidential computing.

Title: Microsoft Sustainability Manager concepts
Description: Explore Microsoft Sustainability Manager's features, enabling efficient recording, reporting, and reduction of emissions and waste impact in Microsoft for Sustainability.

Title: Process custom documents with AI Builder
Description: Explore the fundamentals of AI Builder's Document processing, its benefits to your organization, and its integration with Power Apps.

Title: Build a Microsoft Power Automate flow
Description: In this module, we address the challenge of automating workflows efficiently and how it can be handled using Microsoft Power Automate. We explore the process of building cloud flows, including how to initiate them with triggers. We also cover how to use AI-powered tools like Copilot for flow creation and troubleshooting, and how to ensure reliability through testing and monitoring. Additionally, we cover collaboration through flow sharing and introduce advanced features like "Record with Copilot" for desktop automation. These techniques empower users to streamline processes, save time, and enhance productivity. PL-900

Title: Create a pipeline in Microsoft Power Platform
Description: This module explores how you can quickly create a pipeline and automatically deploy a solution in another environment.

Title: Design agent conversations using topics
Description: This module you're introduced topics, a conversation between a user and an agent, and how to create them.

Title: Ingest DICOM data into healthcare data solutions in Microsoft Fabric
Description: Learn about the DICOM transformation capability in healthcare data solutions in Microsoft Fabric.

Title: Dragon Copilot (physicians) learn to train summary
Description: Learn how to train clinicians on Microsoft Dragon Copilot. Use a practical trainer checklist and curated support resources that cover Dragon Copilot fundamentals, AI-powered note workflows, and advanced features.

Title: Design multi-agent solutions in Microsoft Copilot Studio
Description: Learn to plan and design multi-agent solutions in Microsoft Copilot Studio. Evaluate when multi-agent approaches are appropriate, design solutions using child agents or connected agents, and select the right connection option and coordination pattern for your scenario.

Title: Connect to other data in a Power Apps canvas app
Description: Learn how to connect to other data in Power Apps canvas app.

Title: Dragon Copilot (physicians) introduction to practical application exercises
Description: Learn skills needed to be successful in this course.

Title: Get started with Power Apps component framework
Description: Explore Microsoft Power Apps component framework and its architecture, along with tooling techniques.

Title: Describe Microsoft Power Platform administration and governance
Description: In this module, we address creating secure, efficient, and compliant solutions using the Microsoft Power Platform. We explore how features like a robust security model, structured environments, and centralized administration help users build innovative solutions. Compliance resources and Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) practices also support control and governance throughout the process. PL-900
